summary: Weekend session (US closed Good Friday). All instruments in extreme ranging regime with minimal movement. BTC $67K, XAG $73, XAU $4673, ETH $2058. Both portfolios 100% cash. Key macro: Iran war escalation risk, massive NFP beat (178K vs 50K), crypto extreme fear (index 9). OPEC+ meets Apr 5. Markets reopen Monday Apr 6 with potential volatility from NFP digest.

XAG-USD.note: Silver holding above $70 support. Targeting $73.80-$75.30 if momentum persists.

XAU-USD.note: JPM targets $5,055 by Q4. Central bank buying structural support.

BTC-USD.note: Below $70K. Bearish chatter at 2026 peak. ETF inflows weak ($9M). Watch $65K support.

ETH-USD.note: ETH ETF inflows $71M (bullish divergence vs BTC). Still needs $2,500 for thesis confirmation.

trade_ideas.rationale: Silver at $73, all prophecy checkpoints hit except $120 target. Industrial demand structural shortage. COT net-long decreasing (contrarian bullish). Gold-silver ratio compression thesis intact.
trade_ideas.note: DO NOT trade warrants over weekend. Wait for Monday 08:15 CET open.

trade_ideas.rationale: ETH ETF inflows $71M massively outpacing BTC $9M. Institutional rotation signal. But price still in downtrend. Wait for $2,200 break.
trade_ideas.note: ETH underperforming BTC structurally. Only enter on clear strength.

system_improvements_implemented: BUG-161: Fixed oscillators weight in ranging from 1.2x (boost) to 0.3x (penalize). Was amplifying 34-39% accuracy signal.
BUG-162: Added candlestick-fibonacci correlation group (0.708 corr on BTC). Prevents double-counting.
BUG-163: Added oscillators + candlestick to ranging regime gate. Both below 45% recent accuracy.
All 134 signal engine tests pass. 1216/1222 total tests pass (6 pre-existing failures).

risk_warnings: IRAN WAR: Trump vowed to strike Tehran 'extremely hard'. Weekend escalation risk = oil spike, equity drop, crypto selloff.
OPEC+ MEETING Apr 5: If production increase > 206K bpd, oil drops = positive for risk assets. If hawkish, oil stays elevated.
NFP DIGEST: 178K vs 50K expected. May trigger hawkish repricing of Fed cuts. June cut probability may decline.
STRAIT OF HORMUZ: Still partially disrupted. Any shipping incident = oil spike above $115.
EXTREME FEAR: Crypto fear index at 9. Historically contrarian bullish BUT Iran war creates real tail risk.
research_highlights: Signal accuracy regime shift: mean-reversion (+13.7%) and fibonacci (+25.3%) surging, while fear_greed (-32.7%) and macro_regime (-16.8%) collapsing in ranging market.
Per-ticker accuracy divergence: fear_greed is 93.8% for XAG (best signal) but 25.9% globally. Per-ticker override (BUG-158) already handles this.
Oscillators signal is consistently worst across all tickers (34-39%). Now gated and penalized.
BTC-USD candlestick-fibonacci correlation 0.708 — was double-counting. Now grouped.
ETH ETF inflows ($71M) vs BTC ($9M) — institutional rotation signal worth monitoring.
